data_dictionary.methodology_pdf: Downloaded methodology PDF used as the source document.
data_dictionary.stock_prices: Daily stock prices required for index value and weights.
data_dictionary.listed_shares: Listed/common shares for market-cap and index-share calculations.
data_dictionary.free_float_ratio: Free-float ratio used by most FnGuide/FnIndex formulas.
data_dictionary.corporate_actions: Share changes, delistings, splits, rights issues, and other index divisor events.
data_dictionary.constituent_universe: Eligible KOSPI/KOSDAQ common-stock universe and exclusion flags.
data_dictionary.futures_options_expiry_calendar: KOSPI/KOSDAQ futures/options expiry schedule for rebalance dates.
data_dictionary.month_end_business_day_calendar: Month-end business-day calendar for selection or special rebalance checks.
data_dictionary.market_cap: Market capitalization data for screening, ranking, and market-cap weighting.
data_dictionary.trading_value_liquidity: Average trading value or liquidity data for screens.
data_dictionary.keyword_source_documents: Reports, disclosures, or keyword scores used by keyword/theme indices.
data_dictionary.fics_industry_classification: FnGuide Industry Classification Standard sector/industry mapping.
data_dictionary.score_inputs: Score model inputs for score-weighted methodologies.
data_dictionary.fundamental_factors: Financial statement/fundamental inputs for RAFI or fundamental-weighted rules.
data_dictionary.custom_index_formula_inputs: Methodology-specific custom weights or third-party score inputs.
data_dictionary.index_inclusion_factor: IIF/index inclusion factor needed for index-share calculations.
data_dictionary.dividend_data: Dividend, yield, and high-dividend ranking inputs.
data_dictionary.ranking_inputs: Inputs needed to select top-N constituents.
data_dictionary.methodology_pdf_missing: Methodology PDF was not downloaded for this ETF.
